place: In the Polish forest near Gleiwitz
description: First step back into the gypsy life. Slept in tents and on the vehicles in the forest; the jump from civilization to wilderness is very jarring.

After 4 days' march at the provisional destination. Schoolhouse as quarters; the town is 90% Jewish. Met many acquaintances from the Balkans; very miserable rations. Everyone knows it's going to be against Russia.

Beginning of the Russian campaign at 3:15 AM. Terrible artillery barrage on the east bank of the Bug — everything is burning. Wilhelm drives the Mercedes 170V of the chief Hptm. Baumann in the limber position.
After advancing with Panzer Group Kleist, 6 days before Ostrog, large Russian air attacks. On 06/28, Russian aircraft overhead from 4 AM to 8 PM. Stalin calls them the 'Ghost Division'.
A good week before Berdychiv; the Russians cover their retreat with heavy artillery. 3 days and nights of slow advance without pause.
After 4 days of real rest, back on the job. The old 11th Panzer Division has requested the battalion. Russians in hopeless fighting under political commissars.
Drives 200 km without seeing the enemy, before Kryvyi Rih. The locals here are friendly, glad the Russians are gone. Air attack: 20 wounded in another battery during rifle inspection.
In firing position just before the Dnieper at Zaporizhzhia, 32°C in the shade, 40 in the sun. Many ethnic Germans who welcome the troops enthusiastically.
Takes part in one of the hardest engagements. Afterward, pulled back about 100 km to a so-called rest position. Romanians and Italians are supposed to take over the front.

Takes refuge in a wretched hut, front far away. Kiev fallen, 5000 civilian prisoners on the village square. Forced march 250 km east, breaks through the Russian front. Bomb attack by Jak-2 with rockets; vehicle with half the steering wheel gone.
Slow march toward Rostov with a few rest stops, roughly north of Rostov. Russian night bombers sap the nerves.
Stuck in the mud — 3 km in 48 hours. Roads no longer exist; driving across the fields with tanks leading the way. 0°C at night on the vehicle, very uncomfortable.

In a German village where everything is in ruins, makeshift repairs. Static warfare. 8 days in one house with 2 NCOs and the residents (13 people, 25 total in 3 rooms). A Russian infant is being nursed, the children deloused.
About 40 km back, reoccupied old quarters. Time to sleep and wash. With the I-Staffel repairing vehicles; many signs of disintegration in the detachment. Frost since 11/12.

On the 2nd holiday, change of position to the Slovaks' sector, where the Russians are said to have broken through. Limber position in Uspenskaya. New Year's Eve is spent with good food and 2 bottles of schnapps; Ivan drops a few bombs.

place: Firing position near Goldajewska (north of Rostov)
description: Limber position in a village behind the front, only 14 men, mostly Spieß and NCOs. Hare hunting, very quiet. 1 house for 14 men. Hptm. Baumann has since died from a severe wound.

For recuperation with the rear detachment. 3 days of travel by prime mover, rail, truck, and on foot. Quartered with an elderly couple in a Party-members' housing estate. Dentist, delousing, bathing, cinema. Market with sunflower oil, Turkish coffee.
Arrives at the battery in the evening, good rations with beefsteak and mashed potatoes. Winter won't let go — -35°C, lots of snow.
18-hour cross-country drive in the vehicle to Stalino for repair. Broken spring, tie rod bent four times. Hptm. Ertel takes Wilhelm along on leave in early May.
Wilhelm's first extended leave at home with Marianne and Helga since the start of the war.
